verdict: A well-rhythmed chart with great vocal syncopation and energetic drop segments, but held back by a long, disorienting 25-note continuous spin and unexpected 3-panel chords.

issues.problem: A continuous 25-note spin pattern (R-L-D-U repeating) forces 6 consecutive 360-degree rotations, which is highly disorienting and uncomfortable to play.
A JUMP DR is placed during HOLD L, creating a 3-panel chord (hand/bracket) which is unexpected on a standard Single chart.
A JUMP UR is placed during HOLD L, creating another unexpected 3-panel chord (hand/bracket).
